---
title: "survey on psmu&obi"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

```{r gender}
library(readxl)
PSMU_OBI_cleaned <- read_excel("~/Desktop/PSMU_OBI/PSMU_OBI_cleaned.xlsx")
survey_data <- read_excel("../PSMU_OBI_cleaned.xlsx")
View(PSMU_OBI_cleaned)
gender_col <- "2. Which of the following best describes your gender? /以下哪项最符合您的性别？"
gender_table <- table(survey_data[[gender_col]])
gender_percent <- round(prop.table(gender_table) * 100, 2)
gender_table
gender_percent
```
